heading: RETIRED GRADE
label: 943 RETIRED GRADE
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior chapter 943, consisting of sections 9681 to 9686, related to disposal of obsolete or surplus material, prior to renumbering as chapter 973 of this title.

children.heading: Higher grade for service in special positions
Highest grade held satisfactorily: Reserve enlisted members reduced in grade not as a result of the member’s misconduct
Higher grade after 30 years of service: warrant officers and enlisted members
Restoration to former grade: retired warrant officers and enlisted members
